title: Shift Cost Efficiency Calculator
description: Calculates the overall cost efficiency of a production shift based on labor, material, energy, quality, and downtime factors, aligned with ISO 22400, Lean, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Shift Duration (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Total scheduled shift time in hours. Standard shifts are 8 or 12 hours.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total scheduled shift time in hours. Standard shifts are 8 or 12 hours.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam planlanan vardiya süresi saat cinsinden. Standart vardiyalar 8 veya 12 saattir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte geplante Schichtzeit in Stunden. Standardschichten sind 8 oder 12 Stunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de poste programmé total en heures. Les postes standard sont de 8 ou 12 heures.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total programado del turno en horas. Los turnos estándar son de 8 o 12 horas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي وقت الوردية المجدولة بالساعات. الورديات القياسية 8 أو 12 ساعة.

inputs.label: Total Units Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total good units produced during the shift, including reworked units.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total good units produced during the shift, including reworked units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vardiya boyunca üretilen, yeniden işlenen birimler dahil toplam iyi birim.
businessContext_i18n.de: Insgesamt produzierte gute Einheiten während der Schicht, einschließlich nachbearbeiteter Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités bonnes produites pendant le poste, y compris les unités retravaillées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades buenas totales producidas durante el turno, incluyendo unidades retrabajadas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الوحدات الجيدة المنتجة خلال الوردية، بما في ذلك الوحدات المعاد تشغيلها.

inputs.label: Defective Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that failed quality inspection and are not reworkable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Units that failed quality inspection and are not reworkable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite kontrolünden geçemeyen ve yeniden işlenemeyen birimler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einheiten, die die Qualitätsprüfung nicht bestanden haben und nicht nachbearbeitet werden können.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Unités ayant échoué au contrôle qualité et non retravaillables.
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades que fallaron la inspección de calidad y no son retrabajables.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوحدات التي فشلت في فحص الجودة وغير قابلة لإعادة التشغيل.

inputs.label: Rework Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that required rework to meet quality standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Units that required rework to meet quality standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite standartlarını karşılamak için yeniden işlenmesi gereken birimler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einheiten, die nachbearbeitet werden mussten, um die Qualitätsstandards zu erfüllen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Unités ayant nécessité un retravail pour atteindre les normes de qualité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades que requirieron retrabajo para cumplir con los estándares de calidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوحدات التي تطلبت إعادة العمل لتلبية معايير الجودة.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average fully loaded labor cost per operator per hour.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de la main-d'œuvre par heure
label_i18n.es: Costo de mano de obra por hora

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fully loaded labor cost per operator per hour.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Operatör başına saatlik ortalama tam yüklü işçilik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche voll belastete Arbeitskosten pro Bediener pro Stunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen de main-d'œuvre entièrement chargé par opérateur par heure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo laboral promedio totalmente cargado por operador por hora.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط تكلفة العمالة الإجمالية لكل مشغل في الساعة.

inputs.label: Number of Operators
inputs.businessContext: Total operators assigned to the shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total operators assigned to the shift.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der der Schicht zugewiesenen Bediener.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'opérateurs affectés au poste.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de operadores asignados al turno.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit produced.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per unit produced.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretilen birim başına doğrudan malzeme maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct des matériaux par unité produite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de material directo por unidad producida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة المواد المباشرة لكل وحدة منتجة.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per Shift
inputs.businessContext: Total energy cost (electricity, gas, etc.) for the shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy cost (electricity, gas, etc.) for the shift.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vardiya için toplam enerji maliyeti (elektrik, gaz vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Energiekosten (Strom, Gas usw.) für die Schicht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût énergétique total (électricité, gaz, etc.) pour le poste.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste energético total (electricidad, gas, etc.) para el turno.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي تكلفة الطاقة (كهرباء، غاز، إلخ) للوردية.

rules.message: Defective and rework units cannot exceed total units produced.
Total downtime cannot exceed shift duration in minutes.
Night shift overtime may require additional premium calculations.

thresholds.alert: Critical: Shift cost efficiency is below 50%. Immediate review required.
Warning: Defect rate exceeds 10%. Investigate root cause.
Alert: Unplanned downtime exceeds 60 minutes. Review maintenance logs.

hiddenLossDrivers: Rework inefficiency inflating effective unit cost
Energy cost per shift not scaled to production volume
suggestedActions: Implement real-time quality monitoring to reduce defects
Optimize shift schedule to align energy usage with production peaks
